Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel- Ronnie Gee
Off Calendar Jan-23-2017 Continued To Feb-10-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorneys, Brian Lance and Robert Eugene Cartwright of the law offices of Cartwright Lawfirm (415.433.0444) appear in person at 9:30 AM as counsel moving to withdraw as attorney of record for plaintiff

Attorney, Brian Lance (only) of the law offices of Cartwright Lawfirm (415.433.0444) appears via telephone as counsel moving to withdraw as attorney of record for plaintiff when the motion is called a second time at 11:20 AM

Plaintiff Tameka Williams (916.504.1841) appears to oppose the motion when the motion is called a second time at 11:20 AM

No other appearance is made in this matter

This matter is called for hearing at 9:30 AM in normal course of business. There being no appearance in opposition, the motion is granted and four written orders are signed and filed accordingly.

Plaintiff, Tameka Williams appears after conclusion of the calendar call. Her excuse for tardiness is accepted. Entry of the four orders granting motion to be relieved as counsel is set aside.

The matter is recalled at 11:20 AM. The Court hears from attorney, Brian Lance (via telephone) and plaintiff Tameka Williams as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court vacates its previous ruling and recalls the four written orders. Attorneys, Robert E. Cartwright and Brian Lance's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Plaintiff Ronnie Gee is CONTINUED to February 10, 2017 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. Court directs plaintiffs and counsel to collaborate and try to obtain new counsel and to seek either a stipulation or a motion to continue trial date. Current plaintiff counsel may simply provide names, contact information of possible new counsel.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
